name: Banana Marshmallow Squares
recipeInstructions:
CRUST: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 9x13 inch pan.
In a large bowl, combine cake mix, butter, eggs, and nuts. Blend well.
Press half of the mixture into the bottom of the pan; reserve the remaining for topping.
FILLING: In a double boiler, melt marshmallows, stirring constantly until smooth.
Add the dry pudding mix and bananas to the melted marshmallows.
Spread evenly over the dough in the pan.
Crumble the remaining dough over the filling.
Bake 20-25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
